# Project State — Marine Guardian Command Center

# Updated: 2026-05-30 06:45 GMT+8 by CLAUDE_CODE (Opus 4.7 architect + Sonnet 4.6 executor)

PHASE:        Phase 7 Feature Update — Super Admin Panel backlog item 4
              (super_admin tenant context switching via impersonation
              cookie) SHIPPED to origin/main. Tier 2 backend+frontend
              feature. Completes PRODUCT.md §210 line 216 "Manage button
              to enter tenant context" end-to-end.

LAST_DONE:    Mechanism — HttpOnly cookie `mg-impersonate-tenant`
              (SameSite=lax, Secure prod, Path=/, 24h MaxAge, cuid-regex
              validated on read).

              New tRPC router platformImpersonation with 2 procedures
              (both via protectedProcedure with inline super_admin gates,
              NOT platformAdminProcedure — see lessons.md 🟤 entry 2 for
              rationale):

                enter({ tenantId })
                  Verifies super_admin role + ctx.tenantId === '' (raw
                  session). Looks up tenant on platformPrisma; throws
                  NOT_FOUND if missing, BAD_REQUEST if !isActive. Sets
                  HttpOnly cookie via `cookies()` from next/headers.
                  Audit: PLATFORM:ENTER_TENANT with tenantId=null,
                  changesJson={targetTenantSlug, targetTenantName}.
                  Returns {tenantId, tenantSlug, tenantName}.
                exit()
                  Verifies super_admin role only (raw session). Reads
                  current cookie; if absent returns {wasImpersonating:
                  false} without audit. Otherwise looks up tenant for
                  slug, clears cookie, audits PLATFORM:EXIT_TENANT,
                  returns {wasImpersonating: true}.

              Context + middleware wiring:
                context.ts (16→25L)  parses cookie header via
                                     parseImpersonationCookieFromHeader
                                     and exposes impersonationTenantId
                                     on ctx (null when absent).
                trpc.ts (37→52L)     protectedProcedure computes
                                     effectiveTenantId — overrides
                                     session value ONLY when super_admin
                                     + sessionTenantId === '' + cookie
                                     present. Adds isPlatformImpersonating
                                     to downstream ctx.
                middleware.ts (75→90L) reads cookie directly via
                                       request.cookies.get() — no import,
                                       edge-runtime safe — and short-
                                       circuits both existing redirect
                                       blocks when isImpersonating so
                                       super_admin can move freely between
                                       /admin/* and tenant routes.

              UI:
                /admin/tenants table gains Manage button (leftmost in
                actions cell) per tenant row — disabled when !isActive,
                onClick calls trpc.platformImpersonation.enter.useMutation
                then router.push("/dashboard").
                Sticky amber <ImpersonationBanner /> async RSC mounted as
                first child of (dashboard)/layout.tsx — reads cookie +
                auth + queries platformPrisma for {slug,name,isActive},
                renders only when super_admin + cookie + tenant exist.
                Includes <ImpersonationBannerExitButton /> client
                subcomponent → trpc.platformImpersonation.exit.useMutation
                → router.push("/admin/tenants") + router.refresh().

NEXT:         Backlog items 5, 7, 8 remain. Recommended order:
                5 (schedule conflict detection) — Item 4 unblocks this
                  because conflict detection runs in tenant context that
                  super_admin can now reach to verify across tenants.
                7 (Patrols+Subjects data table polish)
                8 (sidebar role-aware) — lowest priority.

              Also worth a Tier 1 follow-up after Items 5/7/8:
                a) /admin/users page UI on top of platformUser.* router
                   (mirrors /admin/tenants pattern — table + Create/
                   Edit-role/Deactivate/ResetPassword dialogs).
                b) Audit-while-impersonating polish — currently the
                   super_admin's actions on tenant resources while
                   impersonating are logged with userId=super_admin and
                   tenantId=impersonatedTenantId via L5 audit. Forensic
                   trail is intact but does not flag "this action was
                   performed by an impersonating platform admin". Adding
                   an `impersonatedBy` field to AuditLog or augmenting
                   audit writes with a context flag would close the gap.
                   NOT in §210 scope.
                c) Banner in /admin/* routes too — currently banner only
                   shows on (dashboard)/* pages. Super_admin on
                   /admin/tenants while impersonating has no visual
                   reminder. Minor UX polish.
